title: Tipping a Streamer 直播打赏
scene: 朋友讨论是否给主播打赏

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: I have been watching this streamer every night. She is so funny and talented.
lines.trans: 我每晚都在看这个主播。她又有趣又有才华。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: I know her. She plays games and sings too. Have you ever sent her a gift?
lines.trans: 我知道她。她玩游戏还会唱歌。你给过她礼物吗？

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: I sent a small gift once. It cost five dollars. She read my name out loud and said thank you.
lines.trans: 我送过一次小礼物。花了五美元。她大声念了我的名字，还说了谢谢。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: That is nice. But I think tipping can be addictive. Some people spend too much money on it.
lines.trans: 挺好的。但我觉得打赏容易上瘾。有些人在上面花太多钱。

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: You are right. I set a monthly budget of twenty dollars for gifts. I never go over it.
lines.trans: 你说得对。我设了每月20美元的礼物预算。从不超过。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: That is a smart way to enjoy it. Does she get most of the money or does the platform take a lot?
lines.trans: 这是享受它的聪明方式。她能拿到大部分钱，还是平台抽成很多？

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: The platform takes half, so she gets about fifty percent. I think it is fair.
lines.trans: 平台拿一半，所以她能拿到大约50%。我觉得还算合理。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.line: I prefer to support creators by buying their merchandise instead. It feels more real.
lines.trans: 我更喜欢通过买创作者的周边来支持他们。感觉更实在。

lines.speaker: Viewer
lines.line: That is another good way. I might buy her T-shirt next month. It has her cute logo on it.
lines.trans: 这也是个好方式。我下个月可能买她的T恤。上面有她可爱的标志。
